channel.title: FXNewsBias Daily Insights
channel.description: Daily forex market insights focused on the highest-impact news and what traders should watch next.

item.title: Asia Session: US Dollar Strengthens as Bullish News Flow Builds — Fri, 15 May 2026
item.description: Asia session is opening — here is the overnight forex sentiment picture as Tokyo, Singapore and Sydney desks come online. US Dollar (USD) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.

item.title: Asia GBP Weakens Bearish Pressure
